info.title: D-Sports API
info.description: Public API for the D-Sports fan engagement platform (PWA backend). Most endpoints require Clerk Bearer authentication.

tags.name: Misc
tags.description: Image proxy, crypto prices, upload, feedback

tags.name: Auth and onboarding
tags.description: Domain grouping for auth, profile, onboarding, and identity flows

tags.name: Social and locker room
tags.description: Domain grouping for social feed, follows, and community interactions

tags.name: Gamification
tags.description: Domain grouping for quests, leaderboards, points-facing outcomes, and rewards

tags.name: Commerce and purchases
tags.description: Domain grouping for checkout, cash balance, webhooks, and store purchase flows

tags.name: Collectibles and packs
tags.description: Domain grouping for pack lifecycle and collectible inventory

tags.name: Wallet and web3
tags.description: Domain grouping for wallet and crypto-support operations

tags.name: Moderation and reporting
tags.description: Domain grouping for user-facing report submission and moderation-adjacent endpoints

tags.name: Platform and infrastructure
tags.description: Domain grouping for utility, infrastructure, and platform support endpoints

post.description: Generates a sign-in token for the authenticated user. Used by native app: pass Bearer token, get ticket for WebView sign-in.

get.description: Redirects to login.
Redirects to mobile auth. Query: provider, redirect_uri.
Callback with redirect_uri. Returns token or error in redirect.
Verifies Bearer token from native app.
List all teams with enriched stats: fans, totalPoints, rank, lastWinner, isOfficial, league, themeColor.
Teams the authenticated user follows.
Returns leaderboard entries. Query: leaderboardId (number) or teamId (string); omit for global.
Server-sent events stream. Query: leaderboardId.
Total users, total points, last winner.
suggest=1: suggested users (auth). No id: current user (auth). id and/or handle: public profile. All responses use the standard envelope.

patch.description: Update current user fields. Accepts name, handle, location, favoriteSport, favoriteTeam, profileUrl, favoritePlayer, rivalTeam.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all onboarded users. Optionally excludes users the caller already follows.
Returns whether the given username is available for registration. No authentication required.

patch.description: Update profile images and theme. Accepts bannerUrl, profileUrl, and userTheme.

post.description: Onboarding payload. Creates the user profile, initialises leaderboard entry, and syncs quest points.

200.description: { success: true, data: { user, updatedProfile, leaderboardEntry, pointsHistory, questSync } }

409.description: { success: false, error, code: 'CONFLICT' } — handle already taken

200.description: { success: true, data: { follow, counts: { targetUserFollowers, currentUserFollowing } } }

400.description: { success: false, error, code: 'VALIDATION_ERROR' } — missing ID, self-follow, or already following

200.description: { success: true, data: { counts: { targetUserFollowers, currentUserFollowing } } }

get.description: Returns a paginated list of followers or following for a user. Defaults to the authenticated user's followers.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Target user ID. Defaults to authenticated user.

200.description: { success: true, data: { users, total, page, totalPages } }

get.description: Full-text search across user name, handle, and bio. Returns paginated results with follower stats.

200.description: { success: true, data: { users, total, page, totalPages, query } }

get.description: Returns top users by points.
Returns recommended users based on shared interests (favorite team, sport, location). Each user includes a matchScore.

post.description: Star or un-star another user. Returns the new starred state.

get.description: Check whether the authenticated user has starred the given user.
Returns whether a user has completed onboarding. Pass id for any user; omit for the authenticated user.
Internal/debug card settings endpoint.

200.description: { success: true, data: { isDev, user, settings } }

get.description: Returns completed quests for the given user (or the authenticated user). Each entry includes quest title, points earned, and category.

200.description: { success: true, data: { quests: [{ id, questTitle, stepName?, pointsEarned, completedAt, category }], totalPoints } }

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data.

get.description: Preview what would be deleted without actually deleting anything. Returns record counts per category.

200.description: { success: true, data: { dryRun: true, message, user, wouldDelete, totalRecordsToDelete, clerkUserWouldBeDeleted } }

post.description: Verifies the user's password. For OAuth-only users returns oauthOnly: true.

get.description: Synchronises the local user record with Clerk. Returns the updated user with connected accounts.

200.description: { success: true, data: { message, user: { id, email, handle, name, image, connectedAccounts } } }

get.description: Query: category (optional) for QuestCategory; else active quests.
Query: userId (admin impersonation).

post.description: Handles RevenueCat purchase events. Use Authorization: Bearer with REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
Internal maintenance route for quest/points reconciliation.

bearerAuth.description: Clerk session token. Use Authorization: Bearer <token>.
